title: Implement a Paginator
description: paginate.paginator.Paginator is a stub. Implement it in paginate/paginator.py. API contract: Paginator(total_items, per_page) splits total_items into pages of size per_page. The attribute num_pages is the number of pages = ceil(total_items / per_page), and is 0 when total_items is 0. .page(n) returns a Page object describing the 1-based page number n, where Page exposes: .number (the page number n), .start_index (0-based inclusive index of the first item on the page), .end_index (0-based EXCLUSIVE index just past the last item on the page; for the final page this is total_items), .has_previous (True when n > 1), and .has_next (True when n < num_pages). .page(n) raises ValueError if n < 1 or n > num_pages (so when num_pages is 0, every page number is invalid). Implement Paginator in paginate/paginator.py; you may use the provided Page class. Do not modify any test files.
